topic: My power bill has been charging me for a second meter I do not own
title: My Power Bill Has Been Charging Me for a Second Meter I Do Not Own | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My power bill has been charging me for two meters. I only have one.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper power bill on a kitchen table with two meter readings highlighted in yellow marker, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Single story house. Built nineteen seventy two. One meter on the side.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a single story ranch house in afternoon light, a single power meter visible on the side wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pay it online. Twelve years. Same account.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a laptop screen showing an online power company account dashboard, dim home office light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bill came in January. Two meters listed. Same address.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper utility bill with a large highlighted total at the bottom, a calculator beside it on the table, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Called the power company. Disputed it.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a phone screen showing a customer service dispute ticket interface, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They opened a ticket. Said the second meter has been registered since two thousand four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a customer service representative seen from behind at a call center desk, a headset on, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked the property line. Twice.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a house south wall with a single electric meter mounted at chest height, late afternoon shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One meter. On the south wall. Same as always.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an electric meter on a house wall with the digital reading visible, no other meter in frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Power company sent a technician. He found the second meter buried under the back porch.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a back porch deck with floorboards pried up, a utility technician seen from behind examining the crawlspace, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was drawing two hundred watts. Constant. For twenty two years.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hidden electric meter buried under a porch with wires snaking into the dirt, dim flashlight beam visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had the porch torn up. The meter was wired into nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a torn up wooden porch in a backyard with the buried meter exposed, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is still drawing power. They cannot find the source.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the exposed meter still showing a digital reading despite no wires connected to anything, dim ambient daylight, vertical 9:16 framing
